heroHeadline: I build websites you actually keep.
heroSub: When the work is done, the site is yours — the git repo, the Netlify account, all of it. No lock-in, no monthly fees, no platform holding your business hostage.
hourlyLine: Need a change later? Pay by the hour: $50 for the first hour, $75 each hour after, 1-hour minimum. That's it.

valueProps.title: You own it
valueProps.body: The code lives in your GitHub and deploys from your Netlify. I hand over the keys — you're never locked in.

valueProps.title: No ongoing costs
valueProps.body: Static sites on Netlify's free tier mean $0/month hosting. You pay me to build it, then it's yours to run for free.

valueProps.title: Effortless updates
valueProps.body: Want to make edits yourself? I can add a simple visual editor so you change text and images without touching code.

valueProps.title: Personal & direct
valueProps.body: You work with me directly — no account managers, no tickets. Just clear pricing and honest work.

runningCosts.heading: What does it cost to keep running? $0 a month.
runningCosts.intro: Most web shops put you on a subscription — hosting fees, “platform” fees, maintenance retainers that bill every month whether you need anything or not. I don't work that way. Here's why your site costs nothing to keep online:

points.label: Free hosting, for good
points.detail: Your site is static — fast HTML, CSS, and images that Netlify's free tier serves at no cost. No usage meter, no surprise bills.

points.label: Nothing to maintain
points.detail: No database and no server means nothing to patch, renew, or pay for behind the scenes. It just keeps running.

points.label: The accounts are yours
points.detail: The GitHub repo and Netlify project are in your name. There's no middleman subscription sitting between you and your own website.

points.label: Pay only to change it
points.detail: When you want updates, you pay by the hour for the time it takes — and nothing in between. Never a monthly fee.

closingHeadline: Ready for a site that's truly yours?
